author: DisneyMusicVEVO YouTube
text:
Taylor Swift - I Knew It, I Knew You (From Toy Story 5) (Visualizer)
"Toy Story 5" is available in theaters nationwide on June 19.

The toys are back in Disney and Pixar’s “Toy Story 5,” and this time it’s Toy meets Tech. Woody, Buzz Lightyear, Jessie and the rest of the gang's jobs are challenged when they come face-to-face with Lilypad, a brand-new tablet device that arrives with her own disruptive ideas about what is best for their kid, Bonnie. Will playtime ever be the same?

🌟 Every Magical Moment, Every Iconic Song: https://www.youtube.com/@DisneyMusicVEVO?sub_confirmation=1

All Your Favorite Disney Hits, All Together: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLiNVoBckLqLmdcbotc6n_MjdTDCHLiYDo


Music video by Taylor Swift performing I Knew It, I Knew You (From Toy Story 5) (Visualizer).© 2026 Walt Disney Records/Pixar
